tool_use_result.originalFile:
Turn the probe (drag it or use arrow keys) until a bar peaks.

{#each candidates as c, i}
{c.id}
{#if scores[i] >= 0}
{:else}
{/if}

content.text: DONE Built DotAlignment.svelte from scratch: an amber probe arrow (draggable/keyboard role=slider handle) rotating among four fixed periwinkle candidate arrows (c1-c4 at 20/70/110/160 degrees), a separate spinbutton handle at c1's tip for its length (0.5-2x), live cosine-based dot-product scores driving four lilac zero-baseline bars with rounded mono readouts, the top-scoring bar highlighted, all colors via tokens, 44px touch targets, keyboard steps, and reduced-motion handling.

result: DONE Built DotAlignment.svelte from scratch: an amber probe arrow (draggable/keyboard role=slider handle) rotating among four fixed periwinkle candidate arrows (c1-c4 at 20/70/110/160 degrees), a separate spinbutton handle at c1's tip for its length (0.5-2x), live cosine-based dot-product scores driving four lilac zero-baseline bars with rounded mono readouts, the top-scoring bar highlighted, all colors via tokens, 44px touch targets, keyboard steps, and reduced-motion handling.
